art_market.summary: The Korean art market in March 2026 is emphasizing trust and accessibility, highlighted by the '20! 2026 Art Seoul' digital exhibit and major institutional retrospectives.
key_events: 20! 2026 Art Seoul: Launched March 16 with a unique 80% refund guarantee to boost market trust.
Major Exhibitions: Park Chan-kyong at Kukje Gallery, Kim Yun-shin at Hoam Museum, and Damien Hirst at MMCA.
Market focus: Digital innovation, blockchain authentication, and qualitative growth.
art_market.outlook: Qualitative transformation with a focus on rarity, transparency, and clear provenance.

stock_market.summary: KOSPI showing volatile resilience, rebounding from early-March geopolitical sell-offs driven by semiconductor strength.

key_indicators.KOSPI: Rebounding from mid-month dips; Goldman Sachs target remains 7,000 for 2026.
key_indicators.Drivers: Semiconductor sector (Samsung Electronics/SK Hynix) remains the dominant engine for market growth.
key_indicators.Context: Year-to-date up 30.88% as of mid-March; volatility remains tied to global oil prices and geopolitical news.
